notes: Constructive Monday close: Dow above 52,000 on U.S.-Iran de-escalation, VIX calm at 17.6, AMAT at record highs. Cash near zero ($51) and June payrolls Friday keep me at 0.5 with no reach; memory/chips (MU, SNDK) still leaking and ABCL/FCEL overextended stay no-chase.
journal_entry: Mon 6/29 18:17: posture unchanged — neutral/0.5 into a green record close (VIX 17.6, Iran truce holding). AMAT strong stays favored; MU/SNDK soft, ABCL/FCEL overextended remain avoid. Cash $51 caps new risk; bracing for Fed's Warsh and Friday payrolls, watching whether semis floor before adding.
